## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation updated.
- [ ] `devtools::document()` run when roxygen comments changed.
- [ ] Relevant tests run locally.
- [ ] No copied third-party data, source code, class tables, plot templates, or
      polygon coordinates.
- [ ] No built-in polygon coordinates added unless provenance and review are
      documented.
- [ ] No civil-engineering classification modules added unless explicitly
      accepted.

## Notes

Add any review notes, limitations, or follow-up work.
